summary: Outreach Engine doctrine candidate for preserving referral context in follow-up, pending approval.

payload.learning: Preserve referral relationship context in follow-up when a CRM outcome shows the referral path mattered.
payload.evidence_boundary: Use as context for model-owned outreach judgment, not as a hardcoded sequence or tone rule.
payload.approval_boundary: Do not change Outreach Engine doctrine until human approval.
